description: Checkout counts for courses with permanent reserves (items assigned to the 'Permanent' term in FOLIO). Date range filters apply to checkout counts only — not to the reserve itself, since permanent reserves have no end date by definition. Optionally filter to one or more specific course codes. Historical toggle controls whether non-current reserve records are included.

parameters.name: exclusions
parameters.displayName: Exclude course types — comma-separated flags [POP, LAW, NEW, EMPTY]

parameters.name: show_historical
parameters.displayName: Include non-current (inactive) reserve records (1 to toggle ON)

parameters.name: course_codes
parameters.displayName: Course code(s) — comma-separated (e.g. CS 101, ENGL 39). Leave blank to return all permanent courses. Spaces between letters and digits are normalized automatically.
